task: Implement GitHub issue #2205: Refactor PPTX generator to accept TemplateConfig
result: Successfully implemented TemplateConfig support for PPTX generator. Created template-config.ts with Zod schemas, default-template.ts with extracted values, updated generator to accept optional templateConfig parameter. All 32 tests pass. PR opened at https://github.com/slideheroes/2025slideheroes/pull/2206
